blocks.text: Surah Al-Fatiha is the greatest Surah in the Quran and a required recitation in every unit of prayer.
We begin in the name of Allah, seeking His help and blessings.
All praise belongs to Allah, the Creator and Sustainer of everything that exists.
Allah is infinitely merciful and constantly bestows His grace upon His creation.
He alone is the Sovereign Judge on the Day when all will be held accountable.
We direct our worship to Him alone and seek only His assistance.
We ask Him to guide us to the path of truth and righteousness.
The path of those who earned His favor, avoiding the paths of those who earned His anger or went astray.
The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'There is no prayer for the one who does not recite the Opening of the Book (Al-Fatiha).'
